items.title: Submitted: Modeling Binary Relations in Piecewise-Linear Approximations
items.summary: Together with Robert Burlacu, Tobias Kuen and Kristina Rolsing, we submitted our article Modeling Binary Relations in Piecewise-Linear Approximations. You can find our preprint on…
items.content_html: Together with Robert Burlacu, Tobias Kuen and Kristina Rolsing, we submitted our article Modeling Binary Relations in Piecewise-Linear Approximations. You can find our preprint on Optimization Online.

items.title: Submitted: Benchmarking Piecewise Linear Reformulations for MINLPs: A Computational Study Based on the Open-Source Framework PWL-T-Rex
items.summary: Together with Robert Burlacu, we submitted our article "Benchmarking Piecewise Linear Reformulations for MINLPs: A Computational Study Based on the Open-Source Framework PWL-T-Rex". You can…
items.content_html: Together with Robert Burlacu, we submitted our article "Benchmarking Piecewise Linear Reformulations for MINLPs: A Computational Study Based on the Open-Source Framework PWL-T-Rex". You can find our preprint on Optimization Online.

items.title: The PWL-T-Rex is online!
items.summary: I just published my open source framework PWL-T-Rex on GitHub. Using this framework, you can reformulate MINLPs to MIP relaxations and approximations using different reformulation…
items.content_html: I just published my open source framework PWL-T-Rex on GitHub. Using this framework, you can reformulate MINLPs to MIP relaxations and approximations using different reformulation techniques. Find more information on my GitHub or directly on this website: PWL-T-Rex
